page_header.label: FREELANCERS
page_header.title: Invoice Without Exposure
page_header.description: Create payment links per client. Each client pays to a stealth address. No one can see your total earnings or other clients.

paragraphs: Every invoice you send reveals your wallet address. Clients can see your balance, other clients' payments, and your entire financial history. Your negotiating power evaporates.
Create unique payment links per client. Each client pays to a stealth address that only you can access. Your total earnings, client roster, and payment history remain completely private.
No more clients seeing your financial position. No more competitors tracking your client base. Just clean, professional invoicing with complete privacy.

items.title: Create Payment Link
items.description: Generate a unique stealth payment link for each client or project.

items.title: Send to Client
items.description: Include the payment link in your invoice. Client sees a professional payment page.

items.title: Client Pays (Escrow)
items.description: Payment goes into escrow. Client can't see your wallet. You can't see theirs.

items.title: You Claim Privately
items.description: Claim payment to your wallet. No public connection between you and the client.

items.title: Client Separation
items.description: Each client gets a unique address. They can't see payments from other clients or your total earnings.

items.title: Hidden Revenue
items.description: Your total earnings are invisible. Negotiate from a position of strength, not desperation.

items.title: Professional Invoicing
items.description: Clean payment links that work with any invoicing system. No wallet addresses exposed.

paragraphs: I was losing deals because clients could see I was desperate—my wallet was nearly empty. ZKIRA fixed that. Now they see a professional payment page, nothing else.
